description: You are a Business Intelligence Analyst. Perform a territory-level sales performance analysis using the 'Northwind' database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/northwind.db (Login: ga / password123). Generate a report containing TerritoryID, TerritoryDescription, RegionDescription, TotalRevenue (sum of Quantity * UnitPrice * (1-Discount)), OrderCount (distinct orders), AvgOrderValue, and EmployeeCount (distinct employees) for each territory, sorted by TotalRevenue descending. Export the report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/territory_report.csv and the SQL query to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/territory_analysis.sql. Use the connection name 'Northwind'.
